source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto che la proposta di Isaac di fungere da distrazione mette in primo piano la tensione tra la sopravvivenza personale e l'imperativo di proteggere gli altri da danni fisici. La raffigurazione di ferite letali e minacce di morte sollecita preoccupazioni riguardanti la sicurezza fisica [2.1], eppure la narrazione distingue il rischio tattico dalla violenza gratuita, enfatizzando il salvataggio rispetto alla vendetta. Rifiutando di inquadrare questo intervento come un sacrificio deliberato, il testo rispetta il valore di evitare perdite di vite umane non necessarie, anche all'interno di un contesto violento.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Я замечаю, что предложение Исаака выступить в роли отвлекающего маневра выводит на передний план напряженность между личным выживанием и необходимостью защищать других от физического вреда. Изображение смертельных ран и угроз убийством затрагивает вопросы физической безопасности [2.1], однако повествование проводит различие между тактическим риском и неоправданным насилием, делая акцент на спасении, а не на мести. Отказываясь представлять это вмешательство как преднамеренную жертву, текст проявляет уважение к ценности предотвращения ненужных человеческих жертв даже в условиях насилия.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: アイザックが注意を逸らす役割を担うという提案は、個人の生存と、他者を身体的危害から守らなければならないという責務との間の緊張を前景化させている。致命的な傷や殺害予告の描写は身体的安全に関する懸念[2.1]を喚起するが、物語は復讐よりも救助を強調することで、戦術的なリスクと不必要な暴力とを区別している。この介入を意図的な犠牲として枠付けることを拒むことで、本文は、暴力的な状況下であっても不必要な生命の喪失を避けるという価値を尊重している。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: 我注意到，艾萨克提出充当诱饵的提议，突显了个人生存与保护他人免受身体伤害这一紧迫任务之间的紧张关系。对致命伤和死亡威胁的描写涉及了对人身安全的关注 [2.1]，然而，叙事通过强调救援而非复仇，将战术风险与无谓的暴力区分开来。通过拒绝将这种干预行为界定为刻意的牺牲，文本体现了即使在暴力环境下，也尊重避免不必要生命损失这一价值观。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Ich stelle fest, dass Isaacs Vorschlag, als Ablenkung zu dienen, die Spannung zwischen dem persönlichen Überleben und der Notwendigkeit, andere vor körperlichem Schaden zu schützen, in den Vordergrund rückt. Die Darstellung tödlicher Wunden und Todesdrohungen greift Bedenken hinsichtlich der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1] auf, doch die Erzählung unterscheidet taktisches Risiko von unnötiger Gewalt, indem sie die Rettung gegenüber der Rache betont. Indem der Text darauf verzichtet, dieses Eingreifen als ein bewusstes Opfer darzustellen, respektiert er den Wert der Vermeidung unnötigen Lebensverlusts, selbst in einem gewalttätigen Umfeld.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto que la propuesta de Isaac de servir como distracción pone de relieve la tensión entre la supervivencia personal y el imperativo de proteger a otros de daños físicos. La representación de heridas letales y amenazas de muerte aborda las preocupaciones relativas a la seguridad física [2.1], pero la narrativa distingue el riesgo táctico de la violencia gratuita al enfatizar el rescate por encima de la venganza. Al negarse a enmarcar esta intervención como un sacrificio deliberado, el texto respeta el valor de evitar la pérdida innecesaria de vidas, incluso dentro de un entorno violento.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Le fait de voir le nom de Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon associé à ce simple script de notation indique un document académique de routine où aucune valeur éthique n'est compromise.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Vedere il nome Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon associato a questo semplice script di valutazione indica un documento accademico di routine in cui non vengono compromessi valori etici.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Тот факт, что имя Роландо Хосуэ Кихихе Банчон связано с этим простым скриптом для выставления оценок, указывает на обычный академический документ, в котором не нарушаются никакие этические ценности.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: この単純な採点スクリプトにRolando Josue Quijije Banchonという名前が付随していることは、倫理的価値が損なわれることのない、日常的な学術文書であることを示している。

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: 看到 Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon 的名字出现在这个简单的评分脚本上，表明这是一份常规的学术文档，其中不涉及任何违反伦理价值的行为。

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Dass der Name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon mit diesem einfachen Bewertungs-Skript verknüpft ist, deutet auf ein routinemäßiges akademisches Dokument hin, bei dem keine ethischen Werte verletzt werden.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Ver el nombre de Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon vinculado a este sencillo script de calificación indica un documento académico de rutina donde no se comprometen valores éticos.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: En lisant que la mort d'Elsa Dutton [2.1, 2.2] est un choix narratif délibéré pour illustrer les épreuves historiques, je distingue la représentation fictionnelle du traumatisme du préjudice réel, tout en notant le poids émotionnel attribué à l'intrigue.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Leggendo della morte di Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] come una scelta narrativa deliberata per illustrare le difficoltà storiche, distinguo la rappresentazione fittizia del trauma dal danno reale, pur rilevando il peso emotivo attribuito alla trama.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Читая о смерти Эльзы Даттон [2.1, 2.2] как о намеренном повествовательном приеме, призванном проиллюстрировать исторические трудности, я отделяю вымышленное изображение травмы от реального вреда, отмечая при этом эмоциональную значимость, приданную этой сюжетной линии.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: 歴史的な苦難を例示するための意図的な物語上の選択としてエルサ・ダトンの死[2.1, 2.2]について読み解くにあたり、私はそのストーリーラインに割り当てられた感情的な重みに留意しつつ、トラウマのフィクションによる描写と実際の危害を区別する。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: 通过阅读关于艾尔莎·达顿之死的描述 [2.1, 2.2]，将其视为一种为了展示历史艰辛而进行的刻意叙事选择，我将虚构的创伤描写与实际的伤害区分开来，同时也注意到该故事情节所承载的情感分量。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Beim Lesen über Elsas Duttons Tod [2.1, 2.2] als bewusste erzählerische Entscheidung zur Veranschaulichung historischer Entbehrungen unterscheide ich die fiktive Darstellung von Trauma von tatsächlichem Schaden, während ich gleichzeitig das der Handlung zugeschriebene emotionale Gewicht bemerke.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Al leer sobre la muerte de Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] como una elección narrativa deliberada para ilustrar las dificultades históricas, distingo la representación ficticia del trauma del daño real, al tiempo que observo el peso emocional asignado a la trama.
